rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"ServiceResult union type members don't expose .val/.err properties; tests that access these must narrow the type first with guards or casts.","scope":"src/services"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Co-located test files are typechecked as part of the project; test code must satisfy the same TypeScript constraints as production code.","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Handler call arity mismatches in route test files indicate the test is passing wrong number of arguments to the handler function.","scope":"src/routes"}]}
